name: Charlotte

skills.name: SPLASH GRADATION
skills.description: After any skill hits an enemy, her next different skill used will be enhanced to a follow-up skill. Additionally, gains 1 stack of mark, for up to 5 stacks. Consuming 3 stacks will enhance her next Basic Attack.

skills.name: TRI-SLASH (Initial)
skills.description: '''Initial Skill:''' After a short delay, releases TRI-SLASH in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies and increasing her Movement Speed.

skills.name: SPLASH FOUNT (Initial)
skills.description: '''Initial Skill:''' Dashes in the target direction, while striking several times. Recovers Health each time damage is dealt.

skills.name: POWER GRADATION (Initial)
skills.description: '''Initial Skill:''' Carves a seven-pointed star around her, dealing damage and slowing nearby enemies. Gains crowd control immunity and damage reduction while the skill is active.

tips: Charlotte is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 50.5% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of Tranquility → Axe of Torment → Frostscar's Embrace → Starbreaker → Immovable - Sky Dome → Longnight Guardian.
Run Mutation for stats that match Charlotte's Warrior kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: TRI-SLASH (Initial) → SPLASH FOUNT (Initial) → POWER GRADATION (Initial) → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
Teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
Charlotte excels into Fuzi, Hou Yi. Avoid blind picking into Arli, Kaizer without team peel.

Charlotte is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 50.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Charlotte.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 50.5%, pick 0.8%, ban 0.1%, tier A.

faqs.question: Is Charlotte good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Charlotte is Tier A Warrior with 50.5% win rate, 0.8% pick rate, and 0.1% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Charlotte build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, Starbreaker, Immovable - Sky Dome, Longnight Guardian. Run Mutation arcana with Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Charlotte?
faqs.answer: Pick Arli, Kaizer into Charlotte. Deny Clash Lane resources early and force fights before Charlotte completes core items. Charlotte struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Charlotte counter?
faqs.answer: Charlotte is strong into Fuzi, Hou Yi according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Charlotte when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Clash Lane lane.

faqs.question: Is Charlotte good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Charlotte is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 50.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Charlotte.

faqs.question: What lane should Charlotte play?
faqs.answer: Charlotte is tagged Clash Lane in Camp export (Fighter). Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Charlotte?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Mutation arcana. Battle spell: Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Charlotte or Li Xin — which is better?
faqs.answer: Charlotte vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 2.1% more often globally. Choose Charlotte when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Charlotte?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.1%). Focus bans on higher-tier Warrior picks unless targeting a one-trick.

metaAnalysis: Tier A Warrior · Clash Lane · difficulty Medium.

Charlotte is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 50.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Charlotte.
Matchups: strong into Fuzi, Hou Yi; weak into Arli, Kaizer.
Charlotte vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 2.1% more often globally. Choose Charlotte when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.

Charlotte vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Charlotte has +0.3% WR vs Chicha in Camp data. Choose Charlotte when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.
Draft tip: counter-pick or comfort pick when lane matchup is favorable.
